description: Thresholds for relationship health monitoring and slipping opportunity detection

healthy.description: Regular contact, active dialogue, relationship progressing
indicators: Clear next steps or upcoming meeting

at_risk.description: Slowing frequency, approaching threshold, needs attention soon

slipping.description: Past threshold, needs immediate action, opportunity at risk
indicators: V hasn't responded to their email for > threshold
Deal with no activity for > threshold

lost.description: No contact for extended period, relationship dormant
indicators: No contact in 60+ days (any stakeholder type)

thresholds_by_stakeholder_type.description: Days since last contact before relationship is flagged as at-risk or slipping
thresholds_by_stakeholder_type.note: These are business days, not calendar days

#stakeholder:investor.reason: Investors are critical; fundraising moves fast; must maintain momentum

#stakeholder:customer.reason: Customers are critical; must stay responsive; risk churn if neglected

#stakeholder:advisor.reason: Advisors are critical but less time-sensitive; often on recurring cadences

#stakeholder:partner:collaboration.reason: Partnerships are strategic but move slower; allow for longer cycles

#stakeholder:partner:channel.reason: Channel partners similar to collaboration; relationships matter

#stakeholder:prospect.reason: Prospects are exploratory; less urgency; nurture over time

#stakeholder:community.reason: Community relationships are long-term; less time-sensitive

#stakeholder:job_seeker.reason: Job seekers move on quickly; respond promptly or lose candidate

#stakeholder:vendor.reason: Vendors are operational; relationships are transactional

auto_draft_triggers.description: When to auto-draft holding emails or follow-up messages

awaiting_v_response.trigger: Contact sent email > X days ago, V hasn't responded
awaiting_v_response.example: It's been {days} since we last connected. I'm working on {what_v_owes} and will get it to you by {new_deadline}.

deal_going_cold.trigger: Active deal with no activity > X days
deal_going_cold.example: Wanted to check in on {deal_name}. It's been {days} since we last connected. Are you still interested in exploring this?

commitment_deadline_approaching.trigger: V committed to deliverable, deadline in X days
commitment_deadline_approaching.example: ⚠️ REMINDER: You committed to {action} for {contact_name} by {deadline} ({days_until} days). Status: {current_status}

commitment_overdue.trigger: V committed to deliverable, deadline passed
commitment_overdue.example: Apologies for the delay on {what_v_owes}. I'm working on it and will get it to you by {new_deadline}.

suppression_rules.description: When NOT to auto-draft, even if threshold met
conditions: V explicitly snoozed this contact's follow-ups
Deal marked as closed_lost or closed_won

momentum_indicators.description: How to calculate relationship momentum (heating_up, stable, cooling_down, cold)

signals: Days since last contact approaching threshold

email_frequency_baselines.description: Expected email frequency by stakeholder type (emails per 30 days)

active_deal.note: During active fundraising, expect frequent communication

exploratory.note: Before formal process, less frequent but consistent

recurring.note: Advisors often on regular cadences (2x/month = ~4-6 emails)

active_project.note: During integration work, frequent technical coordination

#stakeholder:community.note: Community relationships are less frequent, more strategic

#stakeholder:prospect.note: Prospects are nurture campaigns, low frequency

response_time_baselines.description: Expected response times by priority level (hours)

#priority:critical.note: Critical contacts should get same-business-day response

#priority:non-critical.note: Non-critical contacts can wait 2-3 business days

deal_stage_thresholds.description: How long a deal can stay in each stage before flagging as stalled

initial_conversation.action_if_exceeded: Flag as stalled, suggest check-in email

active_dialogue.action_if_exceeded: Flag as at_risk, suggest moving to next stage or closing

stalled.action_if_exceeded: Suggest marking as closed_lost or re-engaging

commitment_tracking.description: How to track and remind on commitments (who owes what by when)

reminder_cadence.note: Remind V 2 days before, 1 day before, and on due date

overdue_escalation.action: Increase urgency in Sunday digest, suggest apology email

examples: Logan to send report to V
